inputs.fcf_source: FY2025 cash from operations $2.306B minus capital spending $0.910B, divided by 541.3M diluted shares (10-K FY2025)
inputs.normalization_note: Filing FCF only; excludes litigation normalization. Dividends ($6.12/sh FY2025) exceed owner cash.

growth_explanation.years_1_5: Post-Solventum focus on three segments; Safety and Industrial operating income +14% YoY in FY2025; Q1 2026 consolidated operating income +12% YoY (10-Q). Growth assumes modest volume and price, not heroic margin expansion.
growth_explanation.years_6_7: Step-down after PFAS manufacturing exit and litigation payment cadence normalizes.

bear.notes: PFAS payments accelerate; industrial recession; multiple compresses

base.notes: Litigation cadence manageable; post-spin operating improvement continues at low single-digit cash growth

bull.notes: PFAS tail bounded; margin lift from portfolio simplification and buybacks shrink share count

stance_proposal.override_reason: Narrow moat and partial dhando; base Lawrence return deeply below 15% hurdle at today's price despite operating recovery

option_scan.question: GAAP book misstates core assets?
option_scan.evidence: Industrial manufacturer; assets at depreciated cost, not land/NAV misstatement pattern

option_scan.question: In-business loss segment?
option_scan.evidence: Corporate and unallocated costs; PFAS exit costs in segment/corporate drag (10-K)

option_scan.question: Backlog not in FCF path?
option_scan.evidence: Short-cycle industrial products; revenue recognized on shipment

option_scan.question: Private / illiquid stakes below fair value?
option_scan.evidence: Solventum spin completed; no material retained stake in continuing 10-K

option_scan.question: Transitory distribution / legal recovery?
option_scan.evidence: PFAS public-water and related litigation settlements; cash outflows not in normalized owner-cash growth path
option_scan.base_terminal_rationale: Litigation payments are burden on reported cash flow, not upside option in Lawrence base

option_scan.question: Embedded product option in revenue?
option_scan.evidence: No pre-revenue platform segment post-Health Care spin

marvin_floor.notes: FY2025 filing FCF per share; stance gate computed by marvin_valuation.py

blended_best.weights: 100% Marvin floor; no approved third-party blend

notes: Dividend yield (~4%) exceeds owner cash yield (~1.7%); payout sustainability depends on litigation cadence and balance sheet
Normalized owner cash above filing FCF requires human approval before base-case promotion
